message:
test(caam): add MockCaamExecutor and comprehensive unit tests

Add testing infrastructure for CAAM CLI integration:
- MockCaamExecutor in test-utils for mocking CLI responses
- CAAM Types tests (20 tests for converters, parsers, constants)
- CAAM Runner tests (17 tests for all CLI operations)

The mock executor supports failure injection and call history tracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
